title: Golden Gate Bridge to Fisherman's Wharf

origin.label: Golden Gate Bridge, San Francisco, Marin County

destination.label: Fisherman's Wharf, North Beach, San Francisco

routeSteps.destinations: US 101 South, CA 1 South: San Francisco

hazards.label: Off ramp
hazards.description: Highway off ramp — lane change under speed.
hazards.tip: Signal early and adjust speed for the ramp.

hazards.label: Get in left lane early
hazards.description: You need to turn left in 48m onto Alexander Avenue. Get into the left lane as soon as you enter this road.
hazards.tip: Move to the left lane immediately — the turn comes up fast and you won't have time to change lanes later.

hazards.label: Stop Sign
hazards.description: Stop sign ahead — full stop required.
hazards.tip: Come to a complete stop and check for cross traffic before proceeding.

hazards.label: Tunnel
hazards.description: Tunnel ahead — reduced visibility, possible GPS loss, and changing conditions.
hazards.tip: Remove sunglasses, turn on headlights, maintain lane position, and avoid stopping.

hazards.label: Stop Sign
hazards.description: Stop sign ahead — full stop required.
hazards.tip: Come to a complete stop and check for cross traffic before proceeding.

hazards.label: Merge
hazards.description: Merge onto Golden Gate Bridge — check speed and blind spots.
hazards.tip: Match traffic speed and find your gap early.

hazards.label: Merge
hazards.description: Merge onto road — check speed and blind spots.
hazards.tip: Match traffic speed and find your gap early.

hazards.label: Get in left lane early
hazards.description: You need to turn slight left in 10m onto the next road. Get into the left lane as soon as you enter this road.
hazards.tip: Move to the left lane immediately — the turn comes up fast and you won't have time to change lanes later.
